landing.title: Tools that run in your browser
landing.description: A collection of serverless web utilities. Your files never leave your device.

mochi.name: Mochi
mochi.description: Shrink the pixel size of your images right in the browser. No uploads, no server.

metaimg.name: Metaimg
metaimg.description: Read, edit or strip EXIF metadata from your JPEG photos. All in your browser.

createpass.name: Createpass
createpass.description: Create random passwords using browser cryptography. They never leave your device.

hashy.name: Hashy
hashy.description: SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384 and SHA-512 of text or files. Compare against an expected hash to verify downloads.

errors.noCharset: Pick at least one character type.

hashy.textPlaceholder: Paste or type text to hash…
hashy.dropzone: Drag a file here or click to select one

verify.label: Verify against an expected hash
verify.placeholder: Paste the hex hash (40, 64, 96 or 128 chars)…
verify.unknownLength: Unrecognized length. Must match SHA-1 (40), SHA-256 (64), SHA-384 (96) or SHA-512 (128).

metaimg.dropzone: Drag a JPEG here or click to select one

tags.title: Detected metadata ({count})
tags.hint: Each tag shows its name, IFD and type. Edit the value, remove with × or add new tags.
tags.empty: This image has no EXIF metadata.

custom.note: EXIF identifies tags by numeric ID. Other readers may display this tag as 'Unknown {id}'.
custom.name: Name (display only)
custom.invalidId: ID must be an integer between 1 and 65535.
custom.duplicate: That tag already exists in the image.

dropzone.empty: Drag an image here or click to select one

errors.notAnImage: That file is not a valid image.

footer.tagline: Tanukibox · tools that run in your browser
